title: Erica dracomontana
taxonomy: Erica dracomontana is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Erica, commonly known as heaths. Erica dracomontana is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa and is a member of the Ericaceae family, which includes heath, heather, and blueberry plants. The Ericaceae family is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the Northern Hemisphere but have a limited presence in the Southern Hemisphere. Erica dracomontana is classified within the Ericaceae family and is one of the many species within the genus Erica.
